title: Cabal (disambiguation)
content:
'''Cabal''' may refer to:

*[[Star Cabal]], a group that was a secret society of influential conspirators
*[[Azure Cabal]]
*[[The Cabal (expedition)]]
*''[[Exocros Cabal]]'', a colony [[Starship/Legends|ship]]
*''[[Sevari Cabal]]'', a colony ship
*[[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends#After_Endor:_Sate_Pestage_and_the_Cabal|The Cabal]], a faction of the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]]

{{Disambig}}
